name: MessageBird Communications API
description: MessageBird provides a cloud communications platform for sending SMS and voice messages, managing omnichannel conversations, verifying phone numbers, and performing number lookups. Use this API to send transactional or marketing messages, build messaging workflows, implement 2FA verification, and validate phone numbers.

capabilities.name: messages_create
capabilities.description: Send an SMS message to one or more recipients. Specify sender, recipients, and message body.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details and delivery status of a previously sent SMS message by its ID.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: List recently sent and received SMS messages with delivery status information.

capabilities.name: voice_messages_create
capabilities.description: Send a voice message (text-to-speech call) to one or more phone numbers.

capabilities.name: voice_messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a previously sent voice message by its ID.

capabilities.name: voice_messages_list
capabilities.description: List all voice messages sent from your account.

capabilities.name: verify_create
capabilities.description: Create a new phone number verification request. Sends a one-time code via SMS or voice.

capabilities.name: verify_check
capabilities.description: Verify a code submitted by a user against an active verification request.

capabilities.name: verify_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status of a verification request by its ID.

capabilities.name: verify_delete
capabilities.description: Cancel an active verification request.

capabilities.name: lookup_get
capabilities.description: Perform a phone number lookup to get carrier, format, and type information.

capabilities.name: lookup_hlr_create
capabilities.description: Create an HLR (Home Location Register) lookup for real-time network availability.

capabilities.name: lookup_hlr_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the result of a previously created HLR lookup.

capabilities.name: contacts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact with phone number, name, and custom fields.

capabilities.name: contacts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a contact by ID including all profile information and custom fields.

capabilities.name: contacts_list
capabilities.description: List all contacts in your account with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: contacts_update
capabilities.description: Update a contact's information including custom fields.

capabilities.name: contacts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a contact from your account by ID.

capabilities.name: groups_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact group for organizing contacts.

capabilities.name: groups_list
capabilities.description: List all contact groups in your account.

capabilities.name: groups_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a contact group by its ID.

capabilities.name: groups_update
capabilities.description: Update a contact group's name.

capabilities.name: groups_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a contact group by its ID.

capabilities.name: groups_members_add
capabilities.description: Add contacts to a group by their contact IDs.

capabilities.name: groups_members_remove
capabilities.description: Remove a contact from a group.

capabilities.name: conversations_create
capabilities.description: Start a new omnichannel conversation by sending the first message to a contact.

capabilities.name: conversations_list
capabilities.description: List conversations with optional filtering by status and contact.

capabilities.name: conversations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a conversation by ID with its messages.

capabilities.name: conversations_update
capabilities.description: Update a conversation's status (active, archived).

capabilities.name: conversations_messages_create
capabilities.description: Send a message within an existing conversation.

capabilities.name: conversations_messages_list
capabilities.description: List all messages within a specific conversation.

capabilities.name: balance_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve your current account balance and payment type.
